title: December 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 26''' is the 360th day of the year, 361st in leap years. There are 5 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Maria De Aragon]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Aggie Guerard Rodgers]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Temuera Morrison]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 96|''Star Wars Weekly'' 96]] published.
*[[1980]] – [[David Lowery]] is born.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Showdown]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1995]] – [[Droids (1995) 8|''Droids (1995)'' 8]] published.
*1995 – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 1|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 1]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 73|''Star Wars Insider'' 73]] released for subscribers.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 24|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 24]] published
*[[2016]] – [[LEGO Star Wars: Quest for the Kyber Saber|''Quest for the Kyber Saber'']] published.
<noinclude>
